template.name: Women's Wellness
template.description: A beautiful 6-slide pink-themed hormone harmony and wellness self-care tracker presentation bundle.

scenes.title: Wellness Cover
scenes.description: Serif title cover page with soft pink botanical and line overlays.

clips.content: A progressive guide to hormone alignment, mindful nourishment, and reclaiming daily peace.

scenes.title: Core Wellness Pillars
scenes.description: Left vertical image with right title, intro box, and 3 column pillars.

clips.content: Holistic self-care is built upon three foundational pillars that support your nervous system, somatic balance, and emotional alignment.
Calming stress loops, box-breathing, and digital boundaries.
Gentle yoga, walks, and biological cycle workout syncing.

scenes.title: Daily Rituals
scenes.description: Horizontal connecting timeline charting four daily rituals matching reference flow.

clips.content: Drink 500ml warm water with fresh lemon to wake the stomach.
15 minutes of gentle stretching or yoga to release tension.
High-protein breakfast with organic fats to fuel energy.
Journaling top goals before scanning workspace alerts.
Establish a calming rhythm that aligns your nervous system and supports natural biological flow. These routines lay a solid foundation for optimal energy.

scenes.title: Nutrition Grid
scenes.description: Left layout title with right 2x2 grid card panels matching reference flow.

clips.content: Cruciferous greens, organic fats, and clean hydration support stable hormones and constant daily energy.
Avocados, extra-virgin olive oil, and cold-pressed seeds supply stable lipids.
Ashwagandha and reishi extract target high cortisol spikes.
Cruciferous vegetables support cellular recovery and liver health.
Infusing trace minerals and electrolytes resets water delivery.

scenes.title: Self-Care Habits
scenes.description: Left layout title with two large checklist cards on right and check badge.

clips.content: Consistency is key to biological recovery. Checking off these self-care rituals daily builds lasting neuroplasticity.

scenes.title: Calm & CTA
scenes.description: Left title & image with right exercise block and solid pink CTA bottom card.

clips.content:
01. Inhale (4s): Breathe in quietly through the nose.
02. Hold (7s): Hold your breath, relaxing the shoulders.
03. Exhale (8s): Exhale completely making a whoosh sound.
Sync with our community for daily breathing cues, self-care routines, and hormone-alignment support guides.
